unit.command: if [ -f scripts/run_lint_backend.sh ] && [ -f scripts/run_tests_backend.sh ] && [ -x backend/mvnw ] && command -v java >/dev/null 2>&1; then bash scripts/run_lint_backend.sh && bash scripts/run_tests_backend.sh; else python3 -m py_compile ci/check_module_delivery_lanes.py ci/run_module_delivery_lane.py; fi

database.command: if [ -f scripts/run_tests_database.sh ]; then bash scripts/run_tests_database.sh; elif [ -f scripts/check_data_sql_style.py ]; then python3 scripts/check_data_sql_style.py; elif [ -d backend ] && [ -x backend/mvnw ] && command -v java >/dev/null 2>&1; then (cd backend && ./mvnw -q -DskipTests validate); else python3 ci/check_standards_lock.py; fi

api.command: if [ -f scripts/run_tests_api.sh ]; then bash scripts/run_tests_api.sh; elif [ -f scripts/check_api_docs.py ]; then python3 scripts/check_api_docs.py; elif [ -d backend ] && [ -x backend/mvnw ] && command -v java >/dev/null 2>&1; then (cd backend && ./mvnw -q -DskipTests compile); else python3 ci/check_standards_lock.py; fi

contract.command: if [ -f scripts/run_lint_web.sh ] && [ -f scripts/run_tests_web.sh ] && [ -f web/package.json ] && command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1; then if [ ! -d web/node_modules ]; then echo "[module-lane-contract] web/node_modules missing, running npm install"; (cd web && npm install --no-audit --no-fund); fi; bash scripts/run_lint_web.sh && bash scripts/run_tests_web.sh unit; else python3 ci/check_standards_lock.py; fi

notes: Managed repo CI lane template: her lane komutu repo bazlı override edilebilir.
Varsayilan siralama backend(unit) -> database(database) -> api(api) -> frontend(contract) -> integration -> e2e olarak uygulanir.
Sync standardında preserve_existing_paths sayesinde bu dosya taşeron repoda korunur.
